With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

Date March 22, 2026
✦
Venue Akshar Grand Palace
✦
Location Somerset, New Jersey
Mehendi · Garba · Baraat · Pheras · Dinner · Music
RSVP Now View Schedule
✦
hero.designNotes: Deep jewel-toned luxury hero for a modern Gujarati wedding. The background is a rich dark amber-to-midnight-violet gradient with layered radial glows that pulse subtly via CSS animation — evoking festivity and warmth without being garish. Typography is anchored by oversized Cormorant Garamond name treatment with a gold metallic gradient fill, flanked by a circular ampersand badge. The layout uses an asymmetric three-column CSS grid: left aside hosts a flickering CSS diya, right aside features a toran of stacked leaf and marigold flower shapes — both rendered purely in CSS. A glass-morphism panel displays the event details, while a Ganesh Gujarati script line adds cultural authenticity. Floating marigold petals and a slowly rotating mandala ring add depth. A rangoli dot bar anchors the bottom. Full mobile responsiveness collapses asides and stacks content cleanly. No images, no scripts — all CSS-driven.
